request: Design the VIP Lake Travis flagship landing page at the Premium tier.

inputs.ref: client brief call + existing brand deck

brief.deliverable: Single-file HTML/CSS flagship landing page, desktop + mobile + sticky action bar

hardNos.why: brand voice: never generic link text

options.summary: Coordinate-masthead flagship: full-bleed dawn-water hero, Fraunces display type, wake-pin motif repeated in header/footer/sticky bar.
options.distinctionAxis: editorial full-bleed hero with signature motif

options.summary: Boat-picker-first: pricing grid above the fold, no full-bleed imagery, functional rather than cinematic.
Split-screen story: static marina photo left rail, copy right rail, no motion or scrim treatment.

optionFeedback.note: this is the only concept that actually clears the Premium bar — build this one
reads as Standard tier, not what was briefed
no legibility scrim plan and no signature motif; also Standard-bar quality

evidence.statement: Read the client brief call notes and the current marina.com/rentals page this session before drafting; brief.tier confirmed Premium by the stakeholder.
Ran scripts/validate-output.py --tier premium against examples/premium-exemplar.html and examples/premium-lock.json this session: exit code 0, elevatePass true.
Ran scripts/validate-conformance.py against examples/premium-exemplar.html and examples/premium-structure.json this session: exit code 0, all four required sections present in order.

Output audit: 4 colors found, all in lock; 3 fonts (Arial, Fraunces, Quicksand), all in lock; no Hard-NO hits; no unverified claims; all four elevate checks pass (full-bleed hero, legibility scrim, 2+ type families, sticky bar).

Editorial restraint/negative space and the repeating signature motif are not machine-checked (references/elevate.md) — judged by the board this session from the rendered markup, not from a live browser screenshot.

scorecard.evidence: 640px breakpoint present; hero and masthead collapse cleanly
Static review only in this session — no rendered-browser screenshot
Output audit: all colors and fonts in lock; elevate checks pass
File path shared, opens in any browser
Single file, sectioned with data-section markers, commented

elevateChecks.detail: hero section with full-bleed imagery detected (imagery + cover/vh in scope)
scrim/overlay/gradient/text-shadow detected in the hero's own scope

elevateChecks.check: display type system (serif display + sans body)
elevateChecks.detail: serif display + sans body pairing detected (display: 'Fraunces' on 'h1, h2'; body: 'Quicksand')
bottom-anchored sticky/fixed bar '.sticky-bar' contains a CTA link/button

verdict.reason: Brief was complete before generation (including tier), three distinct concepts were shown and only the one that actually cleared the Premium bar was built, the output audit passed clean with all four elevate checks, and the deliverable conforms to the brief's declared section structure.
verdict.requiredProof: Output audit pass (with elevatePass true) + conformance pass + full design scorecard.
